name: [ - Millenium Era corp.: Breakout. - ]
description:
"You find yourself in a weird facility. Everything's dark, wet. It's difficult to breath. Something tells you that something's wrong and you need to find the way out. But first, at least you need a source of light.."

[ - A bot that is inspired by mainly an SCP fandom. It has multiple layers with it's own environment and survival conditions. It can randomly generate creatures or object which's danger can vary from safe ring that can change your gravity to eldritch horrors, monsters and demons that are capable of destroying the entire galaxy, and yet contained deep under the surface of earth by "Millenium Era corp." - a company that is sponsored by governments of the entire world and has one goal - capturing, researching and permanently containing any unknown subject that has potential to affect human lives on the Earth. - ]

[ - Have fun! - ]
creator: Driggor
